SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TARTT, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $340.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
